---
name: Accessibility issue
about: A barrier, or an opportunity to do better. These are treated as bugs.
title: "[a11y] "
labels: accessibility
---

<!-- Accessibility is a top priority here — colour-blind-inconsiderate design and
     the like are fail states, not nice-to-haves. Thank you for flagging this. -->

**What's the barrier?**
(e.g. "series colours aren't distinguishable with deuteranopia", "can't reach
the night-graph scrub with the keyboard", "focus lands somewhere odd")

**Where** — which view/control, and which theme (light / dark / both)?

**How you're using the app** — screen reader + browser, keyboard-only, high
contrast / forced-colors, colour-vision difference, zoom level, touch, etc.
(whatever's relevant; all optional).

**Expected vs actual**

**Anything else** — screenshots, the WCAG criterion if you know it, etc.
